=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:24-8:2) TS377015: This expression contains chained `pipe` calls that can be simplified to a single `pipe` call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call"

[D2] (7:3-7:17) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

[D3] (11:24-16:2) TS377015: This expression contains chained `pipe` calls that can be simplified to a single `pipe` call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call"

[D4] (15:3-15:17) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

[D5] (19:24-22:2) TS377015: This expression contains chained `pipe` calls that can be simplified to a single `pipe` call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call"

[D6] (20:3-20:76) TS377015: This expression contains chained `pipe` calls that can be simplified to a single `pipe` call. effect(unnecessaryPipeChain)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call"

[D7] (21:3-21:17) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedPipe.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipeable in outer pipe
export const result1 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map(n => n + 1), Effect.flatMap(n => Effect.succeed(n * 2)))

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipe in outer pipeable
export const result2 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1)
).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Triple nesting
export const result3 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)).pipe(Effect.delay(1000)),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedPipe.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipeable in outer pipe
export const result1 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)),
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipe in outer pipeable
export const result2 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1)
).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Triple nesting
export const result3 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)).pipe(Effect.delay(1000)),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedPipe.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipeable in outer pipe
export const result1 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipe in outer pipeable
export const result2 = pipe(Effect.succeed(1), Effect.map(n => n + 1), Effect.flatMap(n => Effect.succeed(n * 2)))

// Triple nesting
export const result3 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)).pipe(Effect.delay(1000)),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedPipe.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipeable in outer pipe
export const result1 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipe in outer pipeable
export const result2 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1)
).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)

// Triple nesting
export const result3 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)).pipe(Effect.delay(1000)),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedPipe.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipeable in outer pipe
export const result1 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipe in outer pipeable
export const result2 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1)
).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Triple nesting
export const result3 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map(n => n + 1)).pipe(Effect.delay(1000), Effect.flatMap(n => Effect.succeed(n * 2)))


=== [D6] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipeChain for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D6] Fix 2: "Rewrite as single pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedPipe.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipeable in outer pipe
export const result1 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipe in outer pipeable
export const result2 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1)
).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Triple nesting
export const result3 = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map(n => n + 1)).pipe(Effect.delay(1000), Effect.flatMap(n => Effect.succeed(n * 2)))


=== [D7] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D7] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/nestedPipe.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import { pipe } from "effect/Function"

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipeable in outer pipe
export const result1 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Nested pipe calls - inner pipe in outer pipeable
export const result2 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1)
).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n * 2))
)

// Triple nesting
export const result3 = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map((n) => n + 1)).pipe(Effect.delay(1000)),
  Effect.map((n) => n * 2)
)
